en: game I've never played in my entire life. What's the matter, buddy? Aren't you man enough?
ko: 내가 평생 해본 적 없는 게임이야. 무슨 문제야, 친구? 남자답지 못한 거야?

en: What did you say to me? Seems to me that you don't want to play because you can't play.
ko: 나한테 뭐라고 했어? 너는 못해서 게임을 하고 싶지 않은 것 같아.

en: Can't play? You put the balls into the hole. How difficult can that be? I've seen it on
ko: 못해? 공을 구멍에 넣기만 하면 되잖아. 그게 얼마나 어려울까? TV에서 봤어.

en: TV. That's right. All you got to do is put the balls in the hole, just like on TV. I
ko: 맞아. TV처럼 공을 구멍에 넣기만 하면 돼.

en: tell you what, I'll let you break. Jeffrey, get me one of those stick thingies. At least
ko: 내가 말할게, 네가 먼저 해봐. 제프리, 저 막대기 하나 가져와. 적어도

en: he's got the terminology down. Sir, do you think this is wise? Don't be ridiculous, Jeffrey.
ko: 용어는 잘 알고 있네. 선생님, 이게 현명하다고 생각하세요? 말도 안 돼, 제프리.
